creator: aron@cs.rice.edu
text:
Can the software package "pdflatex" be ported to FreeBSD (i.e. made 
available as a FreeBSD port). This package converts latex files directly
into PDF format. This gives much better typesetting and fonts than
when a PS file is converted to PDF using ps2pdf utility.

Fix: 

Use pdflatex instead of the regular latex -> dvips -> ps2pdf sequence.
How-To-Repeat: Try converting any Postscript document obtained by using 'latex' followed
by 'dvips' and 'ps2pdf' on a .tex file. Compare the result with that
using pdflatex on the .tex file.
